title: Bipples and Bops Mod
description:
A mod about taming birds to make a little army.
Also this is made with mcreator i'm lazy ik
body:
This has been a pet(pun not intended) project of mine for a long time, but the project file got deleted somehow, and I'm taking that as the universe telling me to just release the mod after, like, 10 months of working on and off.

The mod is a little rough around the edges when it comes to some of the later game aspects, but the main gameplay loop is pretty good if I do say so myself.

 

THINGS TO KNOW BEFORE PLAYING THE MOD: Each bipple can be tamed by a few items special to them, but they all can be tamed by bop berries. You can turn tamed bipples into an item you can pick up and put down with a hoe. Also, Geckolib is neccicary for this mod to run.

There's a lot of content in this mod, but I don't really want to spoil anything, because it's made to be experienced in a blind survival mode playthrough. If you REALLY wanna see everything the mod has to offer without exploring a bunch, you can find all the structures through the /locate command, and all the mobs and items are in the creative menu. ![The Bhroils](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0825c725ee905c90e5573987a7f4cef3563c6ae_0.webp)
